hooks.text: ...the 'eternal student' syndrome forces a person to endlessly accumulate knowledge without converting it into results?
...morning exhaustion has become the norm, and every new step is taken through colossal systemic resistance?
...chronic stagnation is observed: others grow manifold while the system remains in standby mode?
...the 'impostor complex' is active, devaluing real successes and blocking scale?
...the 'deferred life' mode is running, with constant preparation for a start that never happens?
...perfectionist paralysis demands the 'ideal moment' while critical windows of opportunity close?
...major deals collapse because the current firmware is not designed for the bandwidth of BIG MONEY?

Hero.subHeadline: Shadow Braking is a terminal block to potential. The Leader is a hypercar with a 700hp motor. If results are absent, it means someone is pressing gas and brake simultaneously. We perform a Shadow Audit and hardware-release the handbrake. Life comes off the brake, guaranteeing inevitable growth.

Author.desc1: Igor Sherlock is a systems engineer. He deconstructs business and psyche like a complex mechanism, finding braking nodes where others see 'lack of discipline' or 'bad market'.
Author.desc2: Founder of Sherlock Capital, creator of the SFI protocol. His mission is to release the safety handbrake that clamps the brake pads, shifting the system to a mode of pure, high-speed movement.

cards.title: NATURE OF INTERNAL STALLING
cards.description: External tools (MBA, hiring, marketing) are just body kits. If the hypercar operates under Shadow Braking, the engine just heats the air. The system is not broken. It needs a firmware update and the removal of factory limits to the Launch Control version.

cards.title: WHO IS BRAKING THE HYPERCAR?
cards.description: The 'Guardians' (Ego) are safety bugs that once saved the system but now act as a locked handbrake. They perceive scale and expansion as a lethal threat.

cards.title: HIDDEN POWER RESERVE
cards.description: Your 'Golden Shadow' is the blocked throttle. Unpacking suppressed aggression and power gives an immediate boost in efficiency and profit without increasing systemic load.

Sabotage.title: SELF-SABOTAGE IS NOT A WEAKNESS. IT IS A PROTECTIVE PROTOCOL.
Sabotage.subTitle: “Why 95% of attempts to accelerate end with the smell of burnt brake pads and a return to the garage.”
Sabotage.setPointDesc1: A strict set-point is hardcoded in the psyche. This is the financial, social, and stress ceiling that the Ego considers 'safe' and permissible.
Sabotage.setPointQuote: “This is the hard-programmed norm of minimum acceptable survival.”
Sabotage.willpowerDesc: Trying to break the limit on willpower is like trying to accelerate a hypercar with the handbrake on. Libido is wasted, the safety system slams the brakes, and the person is thrown back with a rollback.

column1.title: Conventional Therapy
column1.verdict: STUDYING THE PADS WITHOUT RELEASING THE BRAKE. STALLING REMAINS ACTIVE.

intro.title: WHERE DO YOU BRAKE?
intro.description: The Index (SFI) digitizes how hard your safety system presses the brakes. The audit will show why 700hp of Libido burns in vain.

questions.text: Where do others brake, causing you the greatest aversion?

options.text: In weak-willedness and inability to take responsibility.
In false modesty that masks fear.
In slowness and lack of life energy (Libido).
In rigid rules ignoring intuitive routes.

questions.text: Which systemic bug of the world forces you to burn resources?

options.text: Chaos requiring constant micromanagement.
Blindness to unique status and potential.
Toxic environments draining energy and Time.
Templates and frameworks limiting thought.

questions.text: If the system removed all control limits for a day, what would be the first order?

options.text: To rigidly purge the infrastructure of ineffective elements.
To monopolize the market and take absolute Status.
Full autonomy from systemic processes for pleasure.
Dismantling old business architectures to create total novelty.

questions.text: The ideal model of full throttle release is the chance to be...

options.text: A Sovereign whose decisions automatically become law.
A Legend converting recognition into super-Money.
An inexhaustible reactor of pure Libido and life force.
An Architect seeing quantum leaps beyond the event horizon.

questions.text: What is perceived by the safety system as a fatal threat?

options.text: Loss of power and total reset of control.
Oblivion and the status of an 'ordinary' player.
Emotional burnout and total stop of Libido flow.
Loss of meaning and understanding of future architecture.

questions.text: What social camouflage does your system use to mask ambition?

options.text: 'Cold-blooded and fair authority'.
'Modest but irreplaceable pro'.
'Maximum busy, non-refusal mechanism'.
'Dry and impassive rationalist'.

questions.text: Holding which brake pedal consumes 80% of power?

options.text: Restraining hard aggression against sovereign violators.
Suppressing the natural need for expansion and expression.
Endlessly imitating work with burnt-out Libido.
Attempting to shove brilliant chaos into logical Time tables.

questions.text: An absolutely unlocked expansion scenario looks like...

options.text: Total control where the system works like a clock without your Time.
A level of Status where market laws are rewritten under your name.
Being in a pure flow where Money growth happens with absolute relax.
Managing reality at supersonic speed, relying solely on gut feeling.

questions.text: How is the handbrake activated during confrontation?

options.text: Going into total freeze and distancing for a surgical strike.
Draining energy into attempts to prove status and rightness.
Instant blackout: capitulation due to Libido deficit.
Freezing the opponent with complex logical constructs.

questions.text: In which currency is true Money capitalization measured?

options.text: In ironclad protection of personal boundaries and autonomy.
In flawless Status and unreachable scale.
In pure life joy and bubbling Libido.
In Time released to generate wild breakthrough ideas.

questions.text: Factory safety settings (bugs) dictate the rule:

options.text: 'Observe subordination, do not provoke open conflict.'
'Sit quietly, your Status is not yet backed by results.'
'Conserve energy at any cost, or you'll burn out completely.'
'Do not step without analysis, intuition lies.'

questions.text: In case of system bankruptcy, which currency loss will be critical?

options.text: Loss of architectural control over your ecosystem.
Loss of Status and recognition in the eyes of an authoritative circle.
Total Libido failure: life perceived as gray, empty code.
Loss of intuitive connection: inability to see Time flows.

A.title: Sovereign (Control Node)
A.price: Externally everything is controlled, but effectively Money and Time go into micromanagement. The handbrake is pulled on delegation. The system fears losing power, so the motor burns 80% power so nobody 'breaks the frame'. Financial ceiling is inevitable.

B.title: Expansion (Status Blocker)
B.price: The motor roars, but the gearbox is broken. Status is artificially lowered by 'impostor syndrome'. The system pays for low self-esteem with Money that bolder, weaker players take with ease. Braking on manifestation.

C.title: Vitality (Libido Collapse)
C.price: The system burns Libido, imitating motion. The handbrake is pulled in favor of 'correct' algorithms, zeroing out life joy. Business doesn't grow because the driver has an empty tank. Total system bankruptcy will come through depression or health failure.

D.title: Architect (Time Prison)
D.price: You are gifted with incredible vision, but the safety system blocks throttle waiting for 'ideal guarantees'. Time relentlessly burns. While the brain analyzes risks, quantum leaps go to those who dared to release the handbrake.
